title: dalea fieldii
intro: Dalea fieldii is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and is also known as the desert rose or purple dalea. The medicinal properties of Dalea fieldii include its ability to lower blood sugar levels and have anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of the plant include reducing the risk of diabetes and improving cardiovascular health, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
